overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA IV showing the character walking along a waterfront promenade in Liberty City on a clear sunny day. The character descends steps to the water's edge, passes a food cart, and walks along the paved walkway with the Statue of Happiness visible across the harbor.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper waterfront promenade with stone architecture

events.description: descending concrete steps from upper paved terrace to lower waterfront level

agents.ego_description: walking down the sloped herringbone pavement and concrete steps toward the waterfront railing

entered.detail: yellowish brick pavement arranged in herringbone pattern on the upper terrace
ornate stone pillars with decorative carvings lining the upper walkway
large historic building with green copper roof and clock tower
wide concrete steps with drainage grooves leading down to waterfront
food vendor cart with bright yellow and green umbrellas

segments.scene_description: The character walks across the upper waterfront terrace with herringbone brick pavement, passing stone pillars and a historic building with a green tower. The camera descends concrete steps toward the water's edge where a colorful food cart becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront observation deck with food vendor

events.description: character stops walking to stand at the railing and observe the harbor view
character resumes walking along the waterfront promenade

agents.ego_description: pausing at the waterfront railing to look out at the water and distant statue, then continuing to walk

notable_agents.action: woman in white dress standing at railing taking photos of the water with her phone

entered.detail: black metal railing along the edge of the promenade overlooking the water
large green statue on an island visible across the harbor water
weathered wooden slatted bench facing the water
green wire mesh trash receptacle next to the bench
ornate black lamp post with spherical glass globe

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the waterfront railing near a food cart with colorful umbrellas, observing the Statue of Liberty across the harbor. A woman takes photos nearby. The scene includes wooden benches and vintage lamp posts before the character resumes walking.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined waterfront promenade with statue view

events.description: jogger passes by running in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront path passing benches, trees, and other pedestrians with the statue visible across the water

notable_agents.action: jogger in athletic wear running past the character in the opposite direction
man sitting on wooden bench looking out at the water

entered.detail: suspension bridge visible in the far distance beyond the statue
urban buildings and skyline visible across the harbor
tall stone retaining wall with decorative pillars on the inland side

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the long waterfront promenade lined with trees on the right and benches facing the water on the left. The Statue of Liberty remains visible across the harbor, gradually moving from the right to the left of the frame as the character progresses. Other pedestrians and joggers pass by, and a distant bridge becomes visible on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny waterfront promenade that transitions from an elevated urban terrace to a wide, open harbor walkway. It begins by following the character across herringbone brick pavement past stone pillars and a historic green tower before descending concrete steps toward the water's edge. As the camera reaches the lower level, the scene pauses briefly beside a colorful food cart and umbrellas where a woman takes photos, offering a clear view of the Statue of Happiness across the harbor. The movement then resumes, gliding along a long promenade lined with trees and benches as the statue gradually shifts from the right to the left of the frame. Finally, the perspective expands to include passing joggers and pedestrians, revealing a distant bridge on the horizon under a clear sky.
